titleZh: 重磅：从争议解决视角解读《中华人民共和国公司法》2023年修订要点
titleEn: From a Dispute-Resolution Perspective: Key Points of the 2023 Amendment to the Company Law
abstractZh: 从争议解决视角系统梳理2023年修法的关键变化，涵盖认缴资本、股东权利、董事及高管责任、股份有限公司制度等重点板块。
abstractEn: Summarizes key statutory changes and dispute themes with practical implications for capital rules, voting, DSM duties, and liquidation practice.
